validation_summary.evidence: python -m py_compile on 4 changed/new files exits 0 (~0.1s); python -m unittest skills.development-harness.scripts.tests.test_safety_rails -v passes 15/15 (0.7s); python -m unittest discover skills/development-harness/scripts/tests passes 198/198 up from 183 (38.4s)

checkpoint.summary: unit_037 complete. New safety_rails.py (165 LOC) + hook updates + 15 new tests. Public API: record_failure(root, category, unit_id, now) appends a JSON line to .harness/.parallel-failures.jsonl and writes the .harness/.parallel-disabled kill switch when counted-category failures reach the 2-strike threshold; is_parallel_disabled(root) is a presence check; clear_safety_rails(root) is idempotent. Counted categories are scope_violation and ambiguity only -- other failures are logged for observability but don't count toward the switch. Both continue-loop.py hooks' _stop() now clear .invoke-active AND the session-scoped safety-rail files in one sweep so the next invoke session starts clean. 15 tests cover threshold logic (below/at/above, mixed categories, non-counted filtering), helpers (presence reflection, idempotent clear), CLI (record + status + clear), AND hook-stop side effects (Claude Code + Cursor both wipe the rail files). Pre-existing 10 hook tests pass unchanged -- the additional unlink calls target missing files in those tests, which the try/except handles cleanly. Test suite 183 -> 198.
checkpoint.next_action: Complete unit_038 (PHASE_009): verify batch-of-1 uses the in-tree path (no special case in invoke doc) AND integration test asserts final state equivalence. Grep + potential addition of an assertion in the existing tests/integration/test_invoke_rewrite.py TestBatchOfOneDispatchModeEquivalence class (or a new regression test). Most of the acceptance is pre-satisfied by PHASE_007's unit_029 rewrite which collapsed the sequential/parallel fork; this unit is the grep+integration verification of that collapse.
